function.name: skill_manage
function.arguments: {"action":"patch","name":"verified-algebra-workflow","new_string":"  - **Historical quark recovery is complete; derivation is not (updated 2026-07-14):** `D:/Projects/ToE_21st_June_NEWEST/locked_historical_fts_diagnostic_fit.json` now stores the full numerical `Q_star`, compact `J_u,J_d`, fitted `r,s`, action statistics, and CKM diagnostics. `historical_hermes_general_fts_state_recovered.py` was reconstructed from profile `state.db` messages 4051/4057‚Äì4058 and reruns the full seeded frame/action plus Jordan-slot optimization; `verify_locked_historical_fts_fit.py` regenerates `J_u,J_d` from `Q_star` at ~1e-15 residual. Fresh execution reproduces Frobenius `6.1281124e-6`. **Claim boundary:** this is a reproduced historical diagnostic fit, NOT a derivation‚Äî`Q0` is CKM-warm-started and `r,s` are CKM/J-target fitted. Lepton `J_ŒΩ,J_e` and a shared-frame PMNS construction remain independent open gates. See `references/locked-historical-fts-fit-recovery-2026-07-14.md`.","old_string":"  - **Correct recovery route (only if the user insists on a real file):** the genuine `J_u, J_d` were produced **upstream** by the full complex-Jordan minimizer (`full-complex-jordan-yhalf-minimization.md`), which built `X_u = J_u + r J_d` *directly* from a real shared-7-frame `Q` via the associator‚ÜíJordan lift ‚Äî and that `Q` was **never checkpointed**. So: (1) re-run the upstream optimizer and **checkpoint `Q`** (the irreplaceable lost object); (2) build `J_u=J_{h_u}`, `J_d=J_{h_d}` via the locked lift; (3) lepton `J_ŒΩ,J_e` remain an independent **diagnostic fit**, NOT unification; (4) write `locked_jordan_data.json` with honest status tags. Gate C's C1‚ÄìC5 unification rows stay `NOT_IMPLEMENTED_PHYSICS` ‚Äî two independently-fit pairs do NOT constitute a shared-frame derivation; that circularity is unavoidable unless the lepton side is derived from the *same* `Q`."}

parsed_arguments.name: verified-algebra-workflow
parsed_arguments.new_string: - **Historical quark recovery is complete; derivation is not (updated 2026-07-14):** `D:/Projects/ToE_21st_June_NEWEST/locked_historical_fts_diagnostic_fit.json` now stores the full numerical `Q_star`, compact `J_u,J_d`, fitted `r,s`, action statistics, and CKM diagnostics. `historical_hermes_general_fts_state_recovered.py` was reconstructed from profile `state.db` messages 4051/4057‚Äì4058 and reruns the full seeded frame/action plus Jordan-slot optimization; `verify_locked_historical_fts_fit.py` regenerates `J_u,J_d` from `Q_star` at ~1e-15 residual. Fresh execution reproduces Frobenius `6.1281124e-6`. **Claim boundary:** this is a reproduced historical diagnostic fit, NOT a derivation‚Äî`Q0` is CKM-warm-started and `r,s` are CKM/J-target fitted. Lepton `J_ŒΩ,J_e` and a shared-frame PMNS construction remain independent open gates. See `references/locked-historical-fts-fit-recovery-2026-07-14.md`.
parsed_arguments.old_string: - **Correct recovery route (only if the user insists on a real file):** the genuine `J_u, J_d` were produced **upstream** by the full complex-Jordan minimizer (`full-complex-jordan-yhalf-minimization.md`), which built `X_u = J_u + r J_d` *directly* from a real shared-7-frame `Q` via the associator‚ÜíJordan lift ‚Äî and that `Q` was **never checkpointed**. So: (1) re-run the upstream optimizer and **checkpoint `Q`** (the irreplaceable lost object); (2) build `J_u=J_{h_u}`, `J_d=J_{h_d}` via the locked lift; (3) lepton `J_ŒΩ,J_e` remain an independent **diagnostic fit**, NOT unification; (4) write `locked_jordan_data.json` with honest status tags. Gate C's C1‚ÄìC5 unification rows stay `NOT_IMPLEMENTED_PHYSICS` ‚Äî two independently-fit pairs do NOT constitute a shared-frame derivation; that circularity is unavoidable unless the lepton side is derived from the *same* `Q`.
